records.title: Orientalism: Between Fact and Fantasy
records.description: This Met exhibition examines 19th-century European and Ottoman images of the East through painting, drawings, photographs, illustrated books, architecture, arms and armor, textiles, garments, glassware, ceramics, and metalwork, bringing together approximately 180 objects from across Met departments and outside loans.

sources.notes: Official Met featured, recently opened, closing soon, more temporary, and upcoming exhibition cards from a browser-assisted compact snapshot, plus explicit official detail-page seed fixtures for known missing exhibitions. Direct automated backend fetch is currently blocked by Vercel 429, so this source is not a fully automated live ingestion path.
